case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LAWRENCE AGUSTIN BATULAYAN

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQEUST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST S PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAWRENCE AGUSTIN BATULAYAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
